title.en: Claude Certified Architect – Foundations Certification Exam Guide
title.sr: Claude Certified Architect – Foundations: zvanični vodič za sertifikacioni ispit

note.en: Unofficial study rendering of the official exam guide. English is verbatim from the official PDF (marked Confidential / Need to Know); Serbian is a translation added for study.
note.sr: Neoficijelni prikaz zvaničnog vodiča radi učenja. Engleski je doslovno iz zvaničnog PDF-a (označen Confidential / Need to Know); srpski je prevod dodat radi učenja.

title.en: Introduction
title.sr: Uvod

paragraphs.en: The Claude Certified Architect – Foundations certification validates that practitioners can make informed decisions about tradeoffs when implementing real-world solutions with Claude. This exam tests foundational knowledge across Claude Code, the Claude Agent SDK, the Claude API, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) — the core technologies used to build production-grade applications with Claude.
paragraphs.sr: Sertifikat Claude Certified Architect – Foundations potvrđuje da praktičar ume da donosi informisane odluke o kompromisima pri implementaciji stvarnih rešenja sa Claude-om. Ispit proverava temeljno znanje iz Claude Code-a, Claude Agent SDK-a, Claude API-ja i Model Context Protocol-a (MCP) — ključnih tehnologija za izgradnju produkcionih aplikacija sa Claude-om.

paragraphs.en: Questions on this exam are grounded in realistic scenarios drawn from actual customer use cases, including building agentic systems for customer support, designing multi-agent research pipelines, integrating Claude Code into CI/CD workflows, building developer productivity tools, and extracting structured data from unstructured documents. Candidates must demonstrate not only conceptual knowledge but practical judgment about architecture, configuration, and tradeoffs in production deployments.
paragraphs.sr: Pitanja su zasnovana na realnim scenarijima iz stvarnih korisničkih slučajeva: izgradnja agentskih sistema za korisničku podršku, dizajn multi-agent istraživačkih pipeline-a, integracija Claude Code-a u CI/CD tokove, alati za produktivnost developera i ekstrakcija strukturisanih podataka iz nestrukturisanih dokumenata. Kandidat mora pokazati ne samo konceptualno znanje već i praktičnu procenu arhitekture, konfiguracije i kompromisa u produkciji.

paragraphs.en: This guide describes the exam content, lists the domains and task statements tested, provides sample questions, and recommends preparation strategies. Use it alongside hands-on experience to prepare effectively.
paragraphs.sr: Ovaj vodič opisuje sadržaj ispita, navodi domene i task statements koji se proveravaju, daje primere pitanja i preporučuje strategije pripreme. Koristi ga uz praktično iskustvo za efikasnu pripremu.

title.en: Target Candidate Description
title.sr: Profil ciljnog kandidata

intro.en: The ideal candidate for this certification is a solution architect who designs and implements production applications with Claude. This candidate has hands-on experience with:
intro.sr: Idealan kandidat je solution arhitekta koji dizajnira i implementira produkcione aplikacije sa Claude-om. Taj kandidat ima praktično iskustvo sa:

items.en: Building agentic applications using the Claude Agent SDK, including multi-agent orchestration, subagent delegation, tool integration, and lifecycle hooks
items.sr: Izgradnjom agentskih aplikacija pomoću Claude Agent SDK-a, uključujući multi-agent orkestraciju, delegiranje subagentima, integraciju alata i lifecycle hook-ove

items.en: Configuring and customizing Claude Code for team workflows using CLAUDE.md files, Agent Skills, MCP server integrations, and plan mode
items.sr: Konfigurisanjem i prilagođavanjem Claude Code-a za timske tokove pomoću CLAUDE.md fajlova, Agent Skills-a, MCP integracija i plan moda

items.en: Designing Model Context Protocol (MCP) tool and resource interfaces for backend system integration
items.sr: Dizajnom MCP tool i resource interfejsa za integraciju sa backend sistemima

items.en: Engineering prompts that produce reliable structured output, leveraging JSON schemas, few-shot examples, and extraction patterns
items.sr: Pisanjem promptova koji daju pouzdan strukturisan izlaz, uz JSON šeme, few-shot primere i obrasce ekstrakcije

items.en: Managing context windows effectively across long documents, multi-turn conversations, and multi-agent handoffs
items.sr: Efikasnim upravljanjem context window-om kroz duge dokumente, višekružne razgovore i predaje između agenata

items.en: Integrating Claude into CI/CD pipelines for automated code review, test generation, and pull request feedback
items.sr: Integracijom Claude-a u CI/CD pipeline-e za automatski code review, generisanje testova i feedback na pull request-ove

items.en: Making sound escalation and reliability decisions, including error handling, human-in-the-loop workflows, and self-evaluation patterns
items.sr: Donošenjem ispravnih odluka o eskalaciji i pouzdanosti, uključujući error handling, human-in-the-loop tokove i obrasce samoprocene

outro.en: The candidate typically has 6+ months of practical experience building with Claude APIs, Agent SDK, Claude Code, and MCP, understanding both the capabilities and limitations of large language models in production environments.
outro.sr: Kandidat obično ima 6+ meseci praktičnog iskustva sa Claude API-jima, Agent SDK-om, Claude Code-om i MCP-om, i razume i mogućnosti i ograničenja velikih jezičkih modela u produkciji.

title.en: Exam Content
title.sr: Sadržaj ispita

paragraphs.en: All questions on the exam are multiple choice format. Each question has one correct response and three incorrect responses (distractors).
paragraphs.sr: Sva pitanja su multiple choice. Svako pitanje ima jedan tačan i tri netačna odgovora (distraktore).

paragraphs.en: Select the single response that best completes the statement or answers the question. Distractors are response options that a candidate with incomplete knowledge or experience might choose.
paragraphs.sr: Biraš jedan odgovor koji najbolje dopunjuje tvrdnju ili odgovara na pitanje. Distraktori su opcije koje bi izabrao kandidat sa nepotpunim znanjem ili iskustvom.

paragraphs.en: Unanswered questions are scored as incorrect; there is no penalty for guessing.
paragraphs.sr: Neodgovorena pitanja se boduju kao netačna; nema kazne za pogađanje.

paragraphs.en: The exam has a pass or fail designation. The exam is scored against a minimum standard established by subject matter experts.
paragraphs.sr: Ispit je položio/pao. Boduje se prema minimalnom standardu koji su utvrdili stručnjaci za oblast.

paragraphs.en: Your results are reported as a scaled score of 100–1,000. The minimum passing score is 720. Scaled scoring models help equate scores across multiple exam forms that might have slightly different difficulty levels.
paragraphs.sr: Rezultat se prijavljuje kao skalirani skor 100–1.000. Minimalni prolazni skor je 720. Skalirano bodovanje izjednačava rezultate kroz različite forme ispita koje mogu imati blago različitu težinu.

title.en: Content Outline — Domains & Weightings
title.sr: Pregled sadržaja — domeni i težine

name.sr: Konfiguracija i tokovi rada Claude Code-a

title.en: Exam Scenarios
title.sr: Scenariji ispita

intro.en: The exam uses scenario-based questions. Each scenario presents a realistic production context that frames a set of questions. During the exam, 4 scenarios will be presented and picked at random from the full set of the 6 scenarios below.
intro.sr: Ispit koristi pitanja zasnovana na scenarijima. Svaki scenario daje realan produkcioni kontekst koji uokviruje set pitanja. Na ispitu se prikazuju 4 scenarija, nasumično izabrana iz pune liste od 6 scenarija ispod.

body.en: You are building a customer support resolution agent using the Claude Agent SDK. The agent handles high-ambiguity requests like returns, billing disputes, and account issues. It has access to your backend systems through custom Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools (get_customer, lookup_order, process_refund, escalate_to_human). Your target is 80%+ first-contact resolution while knowing when to escalate.
body.sr: Gradiš agenta za rešavanje korisničke podrške pomoću Claude Agent SDK-a. Agent obrađuje visoko-dvosmislene zahteve poput povraćaja, sporova oko naplate i problema sa nalogom. Pristupa backend sistemima preko custom MCP alata (get_customer, lookup_order, process_refund, escalate_to_human). Cilj je 80%+ rešavanja u prvom kontaktu uz znanje kada da eskalira.

primary_domains.en: Agentic Architecture & Orchestration, Tool Design & MCP Integration, Context Management & Reliability
primary_domains.sr: Agentska arhitektura i orkestracija, Dizajn alata i MCP integracija, Upravljanje kontekstom i pouzdanost

body.en: You are using Claude Code to accelerate software development. Your team uses it for code generation, refactoring, debugging, and documentation. You need to integrate it into your development workflow with custom slash commands, CLAUDE.md configurations, and understand when to use plan mode vs direct execution.
body.sr: Koristiš Claude Code da ubrzaš razvoj softvera. Tim ga koristi za generisanje koda, refaktorisanje, debug i dokumentaciju. Treba da ga integrišeš u razvojni tok sa custom slash komandama, CLAUDE.md konfiguracijama i razumeš kada koristiti plan mod a kada direktno izvršavanje.

primary_domains.en: Claude Code Configuration & Workflows, Context Management & Reliability
primary_domains.sr: Konfiguracija i tokovi rada Claude Code-a, Upravljanje kontekstom i pouzdanost

body.en: You are building a multi-agent research system using the Claude Agent SDK. A coordinator agent delegates to specialized subagents: one searches the web, one analyzes documents, one synthesizes findings, and one generates reports. The system researches topics and produces comprehensive, cited reports.
body.sr: Gradiš multi-agent istraživački sistem pomoću Claude Agent SDK-a. Koordinator delegira specijalizovanim subagentima: jedan pretražuje web, jedan analizira dokumente, jedan sintetiše nalaze i jedan generiše izveštaje. Sistem istražuje teme i pravi sveobuhvatne, citirane izveštaje.

primary_domains.en: Agentic Architecture & Orchestration, Tool Design & MCP Integration, Context Management & Reliability
primary_domains.sr: Agentska arhitektura i orkestracija, Dizajn alata i MCP integracija, Upravljanje kontekstom i pouzdanost

body.en: You are building developer productivity tools using the Claude Agent SDK. The agent helps engineers explore unfamiliar codebases, understand legacy systems, generate boilerplate code, and automate repetitive tasks. It uses the built-in tools (Read, Write, Bash, Grep, Glob) and integrates with Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers.
body.sr: Gradiš alate za produktivnost developera pomoću Claude Agent SDK-a. Agent pomaže inženjerima da istraže nepoznate kodne baze, razumeju legacy sisteme, generišu boilerplate kod i automatizuju repetitivne zadatke. Koristi ugrađene alate (Read, Write, Bash, Grep, Glob) i integriše se sa MCP serverima.

primary_domains.en: Tool Design & MCP Integration, Claude Code Configuration & Workflows, Agentic Architecture & Orchestration
primary_domains.sr: Dizajn alata i MCP integracija, Konfiguracija i tokovi rada Claude Code-a, Agentska arhitektura i orkestracija

body.en: You are integrating Claude Code into your Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment (CI/CD) pipeline. The system runs automated code reviews, generates test cases, and provides feedback on pull requests. You need to design prompts that provide actionable feedback and minimize false positives.
body.sr: Integrišeš Claude Code u svoj CI/CD pipeline. Sistem pokreće automatske code review-e, generiše test slučajeve i daje feedback na pull request-ove. Treba da dizajniraš promptove koji daju upotrebljiv feedback i smanjuju false positive-e.

primary_domains.en: Claude Code Configuration & Workflows, Prompt Engineering & Structured Output
primary_domains.sr: Konfiguracija i tokovi rada Claude Code-a, Prompt engineering i strukturisan izlaz

body.en: You are building a structured data extraction system using Claude. The system extracts information from unstructured documents, validates the output using JavaScript Object Notation (JSON) schemas, and maintains high accuracy. It must handle edge cases gracefully and integrate with downstream systems.
body.sr: Gradiš sistem za ekstrakciju strukturisanih podataka pomoću Claude-a. Sistem vadi informacije iz nestrukturisanih dokumenata, validira izlaz JSON šemama i održava visoku tačnost. Mora gracioznо da obrađuje edge case-ove i da se integriše sa downstream sistemima.

primary_domains.en: Prompt Engineering & Structured Output, Context Management & Reliability
primary_domains.sr: Prompt engineering i strukturisan izlaz, Upravljanje kontekstom i pouzdanost

title.en: Domain 1: Agentic Architecture & Orchestration
title.sr: Domen 1: Agentska arhitektura i orkestracija

title.en: Design and implement agentic loops for autonomous task execution
title.sr: Dizajn i implementacija agentskih petlji za autonomno izvršavanje zadataka

knowledge.en: The agentic loop lifecycle: sending requests to Claude, inspecting stop_reason ("tool_use" vs "end_turn"), executing requested tools, and returning results for the next iteration
knowledge.sr: Životni ciklus agentske petlje: slanje zahteva Claude-u, provera stop_reason-a ("tool_use" vs "end_turn"), izvršavanje traženih alata i vraćanje rezultata za sledeću iteraciju

knowledge.en: How tool results are appended to conversation history so the model can reason about the next action
knowledge.sr: Kako se rezultati alata dodaju u istoriju razgovora da model može da rezonuje o sledećoj akciji

knowledge.en: The distinction between model-driven decision-making (Claude reasons about which tool to call next based on context) and pre-configured decision trees or tool sequences
knowledge.sr: Razlika između odlučivanja vođenog modelom (Claude na osnovu konteksta zaključuje koji alat sledeći da pozove) i unapred konfigurisanih stabala odlučivanja ili fiksnih nizova alata

skills.en: Implementing agentic loop control flow that continues when stop_reason is "tool_use" and terminates when stop_reason is "end_turn"
skills.sr: Implementacija kontrole toka petlje koja nastavlja kad je stop_reason "tool_use" a staje kad je "end_turn"

skills.en: Adding tool results to conversation context between iterations so the model can incorporate new information into its reasoning
skills.sr: Dodavanje rezultata alata u kontekst između iteracija da model uključi nove informacije u rezonovanje

skills.en: Avoiding anti-patterns such as parsing natural language signals to determine loop termination, setting arbitrary iteration caps as the primary stopping mechanism, or checking for assistant text content as a completion indicator
skills.sr: Izbegavanje anti-paterna poput parsiranja prirodnog jezika za zaustavljanje petlje, postavljanja proizvoljnog iteration cap-a kao glavnog mehanizma zaustavljanja ili provere da li postoji tekst asistenta kao indikatora završetka

title.en: Orchestrate multi-agent systems with coordinator-subagent patterns
title.sr: Orkestracija multi-agent sistema obrascem koordinator-subagent

knowledge.en: Hub-and-spoke architecture where a coordinator agent manages all inter-subagent communication, error handling, and information routing
knowledge.sr: Hub-and-spoke arhitektura gde koordinator upravlja svom komunikacijom između subagenata, error handling-om i rutiranjem informacija

knowledge.en: How subagents operate with isolated context—they do not inherit the coordinator's conversation history automatically
knowledge.sr: Kako subagenti rade sa izolovanim kontekstom — ne nasleđuju automatski koordinatorovu istoriju razgovora

knowledge.en: The role of the coordinator in task decomposition, delegation, result aggregation, and deciding which subagents to invoke based on query complexity
knowledge.sr: Uloga koordinatora u dekompoziciji zadatka, delegiranju, agregaciji rezultata i odluči koje subagente pozvati prema složenosti upita

knowledge.en: Risks of overly narrow task decomposition by the coordinator, leading to incomplete coverage of broad research topics
knowledge.sr: Rizici preuske dekompozicije od strane koordinatora, koja vodi nepotpunoj pokrivenosti širokih istraživačkih tema

skills.en: Designing coordinator agents that analyze query requirements and dynamically select which subagents to invoke rather than always routing through the full pipeline
skills.sr: Dizajn koordinatora koji analizira zahteve upita i dinamički bira koje subagente da pozove umesto da uvek provlači sve kroz pun pipeline

skills.en: Partitioning research scope across subagents to minimize duplication (e.g., assigning distinct subtopics or source types to each agent)
skills.sr: Podela istraživačkog opsega među subagentima radi smanjenja dupliranja (npr. dodela različitih podtema ili tipova izvora svakom agentu)

skills.en: Implementing iterative refinement loops where the coordinator evaluates synthesis output for gaps, re-delegates to search and analysis subagents with targeted queries, and re-invokes synthesis until coverage is sufficient
skills.sr: Implementacija iterativnih petlji dorade gde koordinator proverava izlaz sinteze na rupe, ponovo delegira pretraži i analizi sa ciljanim upitima i ponovo poziva sintezu dok pokrivenost ne bude dovoljna

skills.en: Routing all subagent communication through the coordinator for observability, consistent error handling, and controlled information flow
skills.sr: Rutiranje sve komunikacije subagenata kroz koordinatora radi vidljivosti, doslednog error handling-a i kontrolisanog toka informacija

title.en: Configure subagent invocation, context passing, and spawning
title.sr: Konfiguracija pozivanja subagenata, prenosa konteksta i pokretanja

knowledge.en: The Task tool as the mechanism for spawning subagents, and the requirement that allowedTools must include "Task" for a coordinator to invoke subagents
knowledge.sr: Task alat kao mehanizam za pokretanje subagenata i zahtev da allowedTools mora sadržati "Task" da bi koordinator mogao da poziva subagente

knowledge.en: That subagent context must be explicitly provided in the prompt—subagents do not automatically inherit parent context or share memory between invocations
knowledge.sr: Da se kontekst subagentu mora eksplicitno dati u promptu — subagenti ne nasleđuju automatski roditeljski kontekst niti dele memoriju između poziva

knowledge.en: The AgentDefinition configuration including descriptions, system prompts, and tool restrictions for each subagent type
knowledge.sr: AgentDefinition konfiguracija sa opisima, sistemskim promptovima i ograničenjima alata za svaki tip subagenta

knowledge.en: Fork-based session management for exploring divergent approaches from a shared analysis baseline
knowledge.sr: Upravljanje sesijama preko fork-a za istraživanje divergentnih pristupa iz zajedničke analitičke osnove

skills.en: Including complete findings from prior agents directly in the subagent's prompt (e.g., passing web search results and document analysis outputs to the synthesis subagent)
skills.sr: Uključivanje kompletnih nalaza prethodnih agenata direktno u prompt subagenta (npr. prosleđivanje rezultata web pretrage i analize dokumenata subagentu za sintezu)

skills.en: Using structured data formats to separate content from metadata (source URLs, document names, page numbers) when passing context between agents to preserve attribution
skills.sr: Korišćenje strukturisanih formata da se sadržaj odvoji od metapodataka (URL izvora, imena dokumenata, brojevi strana) pri prenosu konteksta radi očuvanja atribucije

skills.en: Spawning parallel subagents by emitting multiple Task tool calls in a single coordinator response rather than across separate turns
skills.sr: Pokretanje paralelnih subagenata emitovanjem više Task poziva u jednom odgovoru koordinatora umesto kroz odvojene poteze

skills.en: Designing coordinator prompts that specify research goals and quality criteria rather than step-by-step procedural instructions, to enable subagent adaptability
skills.sr: Dizajn koordinatorovih promptova koji zadaju istraživačke ciljeve i kriterijume kvaliteta umesto korak-po-korak procedura, radi prilagodljivosti subagenata

title.en: Implement multi-step workflows with enforcement and handoff patterns
title.sr: Implementacija višekoračnih tokova sa obrascima sprovođenja i predaje

knowledge.en: The difference between programmatic enforcement (hooks, prerequisite gates) and prompt-based guidance for workflow ordering
knowledge.sr: Razlika između programskog sprovođenja (hook-ovi, prerequisite gate-ovi) i vođenja kroz prompt za redosled toka rada

knowledge.en: When deterministic compliance is required (e.g., identity verification before financial operations), prompt instructions alone have a non-zero failure rate
knowledge.sr: Kad je potrebna deterministička usklađenost (npr. verifikacija identiteta pre finansijskih operacija), same prompt instrukcije imaju nenulti procenat greške

knowledge.en: Structured handoff protocols for mid-process escalation that include customer details, root cause analysis, and recommended actions
knowledge.sr: Strukturisani protokoli predaje za eskalaciju usred procesa koji uključuju podatke o korisniku, analizu uzroka i preporučene akcije

skills.en: Implementing programmatic prerequisites that block downstream tool calls until prerequisite steps have completed (e.g., blocking process_refund until get_customer has returned a verified customer ID)
skills.sr: Implementacija programskih preduslova koji blokiraju naredne pozive alata dok se preduslovni koraci ne završe (npr. blokiranje process_refund dok get_customer ne vrati verifikovan ID korisnika)

skills.en: Decomposing multi-concern customer requests into distinct items, then investigating each in parallel using shared context before synthesizing a unified resolution
skills.sr: Razlaganje višeproblemskih zahteva na zasebne stavke, pa paralelno istraživanje svake uz deljen kontekst pre sinteze jedinstvenog rešenja

skills.en: Compiling structured handoff summaries (customer ID, root cause, refund amount, recommended action) when escalating to human agents who lack access to the conversation transcript
skills.sr: Sastavljanje strukturisanih sažetaka predaje (ID korisnika, uzrok, iznos povraćaja, preporučena akcija) pri eskalaciji ka ljudima koji nemaju pristup transkriptu razgovora

title.en: Apply Agent SDK hooks for tool call interception and data normalization
title.sr: Primena Agent SDK hook-ova za presretanje poziva alata i normalizaciju podataka

knowledge.en: Hook patterns (e.g., PostToolUse) that intercept tool results for transformation before the model processes them
knowledge.sr: Obrasci hook-ova (npr. PostToolUse) koji presreću rezultate alata radi transformacije pre nego što ih model obradi

knowledge.en: Hook patterns that intercept outgoing tool calls to enforce compliance rules (e.g., blocking refunds above a threshold)
knowledge.sr: Obrasci hook-ova koji presreću odlazeće pozive alata radi sprovođenja pravila (npr. blokiranje povraćaja iznad praga)

knowledge.en: The distinction between using hooks for deterministic guarantees versus relying on prompt instructions for probabilistic compliance
knowledge.sr: Razlika između korišćenja hook-ova za determinističke garancije i oslanjanja na prompt instrukcije za probabilističku usklađenost

skills.en: Implementing PostToolUse hooks to normalize heterogeneous data formats (Unix timestamps, ISO 8601, numeric status codes) from different MCP tools before the agent processes them
skills.sr: Implementacija PostToolUse hook-ova za normalizaciju heterogenih formata podataka (Unix timestamp-ovi, ISO 8601, numerički status kodovi) iz različitih MCP alata pre obrade

skills.en: Implementing tool call interception hooks that block policy-violating actions (e.g., refunds exceeding $500) and redirect to alternative workflows (e.g., human escalation)
skills.sr: Implementacija hook-ova za presretanje poziva koji blokiraju akcije protiv pravila (npr. povraćaj preko $500) i preusmeravaju na alternativni tok (npr. eskalacija čoveku)

skills.en: Choosing hooks over prompt-based enforcement when business rules require guaranteed compliance
skills.sr: Biranje hook-ova umesto sprovođenja kroz prompt kad poslovna pravila zahtevaju garantovanu usklađenost

title.en: Design task decomposition strategies for complex workflows
title.sr: Dizajn strategija dekompozicije zadataka za složene tokove

knowledge.en: When to use fixed sequential pipelines (prompt chaining) versus dynamic adaptive decomposition based on intermediate findings
knowledge.sr: Kada koristiti fiksne sekvencijalne pipeline-e (prompt chaining) a kada dinamičku adaptivnu dekompoziciju na osnovu međurezultata

knowledge.en: Prompt chaining patterns that break reviews into sequential steps (e.g., analyze each file individually, then run a cross-file integration pass)
knowledge.sr: Obrasci prompt chaining-a koji dele review na sekvencijalne korake (npr. analiziraj svaki fajl pojedinačno, pa pokreni cross-file integracioni prolaz)

knowledge.en: The value of adaptive investigation plans that generate subtasks based on what is discovered at each step
knowledge.sr: Vrednost adaptivnih istražnih planova koji generišu podzadatke na osnovu onoga što se otkrije u svakom koraku

skills.en: Selecting task decomposition patterns appropriate to the workflow: prompt chaining for predictable multi-aspect reviews, dynamic decomposition for open-ended investigation tasks
skills.sr: Izbor obrasca dekompozicije prema toku: prompt chaining za predvidljive višeaspektne review-e, dinamička dekompozicija za otvorene istražne zadatke

skills.en: Splitting large code reviews into per-file local analysis passes plus a separate cross-file integration pass to avoid attention dilution
skills.sr: Deljenje velikih code review-a na lokalne prolaze po fajlu plus zaseban cross-file integracioni prolaz radi izbegavanja attention dilution-a

skills.en: Decomposing open-ended tasks (e.g., "add comprehensive tests to a legacy codebase") by first mapping structure, identifying high-impact areas, then creating a prioritized plan that adapts as dependencies are discovered
skills.sr: Razlaganje otvorenih zadataka (npr. „dodaj sveobuhvatne testove u legacy bazu") tako što se prvo mapira struktura, identifikuju oblasti najvećeg uticaja, pa pravi prioritizovan plan koji se prilagođava kako se otkrivaju zavisnosti

title.en: Manage session state, resumption, and forking
title.sr: Upravljanje stanjem sesije, nastavkom i forkovanjem

knowledge.en: Named session resumption using --resume <session-name> to continue a specific prior conversation
knowledge.sr: Nastavak imenovane sesije pomoću --resume <session-name> radi nastavka određenog prethodnog razgovora

knowledge.en: fork_session for creating independent branches from a shared analysis baseline to explore divergent approaches
knowledge.sr: fork_session za pravljenje nezavisnih grana iz zajedničke analitičke osnove radi istraživanja divergentnih pristupa

knowledge.en: The importance of informing the agent about changes to previously analyzed files when resuming sessions after code modifications
knowledge.sr: Važnost obaveštavanja agenta o izmenama ranije analiziranih fajlova pri nastavku sesije posle izmena koda

knowledge.en: Why starting a new session with a structured summary is more reliable than resuming with stale tool results
knowledge.sr: Zašto je pokretanje nove sesije sa strukturisanim sažetkom pouzdanije od nastavka sa zastarelim rezultatima alata

skills.en: Using --resume with session names to continue named investigation sessions across work sessions
skills.sr: Korišćenje --resume sa imenima sesija za nastavak imenovanih istražnih sesija kroz radne sesije

skills.en: Using fork_session to create parallel exploration branches (e.g., comparing two testing strategies or refactoring approaches from a shared codebase analysis)
skills.sr: Korišćenje fork_session za paralelne grane istraživanja (npr. poređenje dve test strategije ili pristupa refaktorisanju iz zajedničke analize baze)

skills.en: Choosing between session resumption (when prior context is mostly valid) and starting fresh with injected summaries (when prior tool results are stale)
skills.sr: Biranje između nastavka sesije (kad je prethodni kontekst uglavnom validan) i kretanja iz početka sa ubačenim sažecima (kad su prethodni rezultati alata zastareli)

skills.en: Informing a resumed session about specific file changes for targeted re-analysis rather than requiring full re-exploration
skills.sr: Obaveštavanje nastavljene sesije o konkretnim izmenama fajlova radi ciljane re-analize umesto pune ponovne eksploracije

title.en: Domain 2: Tool Design & MCP Integration
title.sr: Domen 2: Dizajn alata i MCP integracija

title.en: Design effective tool interfaces with clear descriptions and boundaries
title.sr: Dizajn efektivnih interfejsa alata sa jasnim opisima i granicama

knowledge.en: Tool descriptions as the primary mechanism LLMs use for tool selection; minimal descriptions lead to unreliable selection among similar tools
knowledge.sr: Opisi alata kao primarni mehanizam koji LLM-ovi koriste za izbor alata; minimalni opisi vode nepouzdanom izboru između sličnih alata

knowledge.en: The importance of including input formats, example queries, edge cases, and boundary explanations in tool descriptions
knowledge.sr: Važnost uključivanja formata ulaza, primera upita, edge case-ova i objašnjenja granica u opise alata

knowledge.en: How ambiguous or overlapping tool descriptions cause misrouting (e.g., analyze_content vs analyze_document with near-identical descriptions)
knowledge.sr: Kako dvosmisleni ili preklapajući opisi alata izazivaju pogrešno rutiranje (npr. analyze_content vs analyze_document sa skoro identičnim opisima)

knowledge.en: The impact of system prompt wording on tool selection: keyword-sensitive instructions can create unintended tool associations
knowledge.sr: Uticaj formulacije sistemskog prompta na izbor alata: instrukcije osetljive na ključne reči mogu stvoriti neželjene asocijacije ka alatima

skills.en: Writing tool descriptions that clearly differentiate each tool's purpose, expected inputs, outputs, and when to use it versus similar alternatives
skills.sr: Pisanje opisa alata koji jasno razlikuju svrhu svakog alata, očekivane ulaze, izlaze i kada ga koristiti naspram sličnih alternativa

skills.en: Renaming tools and updating descriptions to eliminate functional overlap (e.g., renaming analyze_content to extract_web_results with a web-specific description)
skills.sr: Preimenovanje alata i ažuriranje opisa radi uklanjanja funkcionalnog preklapanja (npr. analyze_content u extract_web_results sa web-specifičnim opisom)

skills.en: Splitting generic tools into purpose-specific tools with defined input/output contracts (e.g., splitting a generic analyze_document into extract_data_points, summarize_content, and verify_claim_against_source)
skills.sr: Razbijanje generičkih alata na namenske alate sa definisanim ulaz/izlaz ugovorima (npr. generički analyze_document na extract_data_points, summarize_content i verify_claim_against_source)

skills.en: Reviewing system prompts for keyword-sensitive instructions that might override well-written tool descriptions
skills.sr: Pregled sistemskih promptova za instrukcije osetljive na ključne reči koje bi mogle da nadjačaju dobro napisane opise alata

title.en: Implement structured error responses for MCP tools
title.sr: Implementacija strukturisanih grešaka za MCP alate

knowledge.en: The MCP isError flag pattern for communicating tool failures back to the agent
knowledge.sr: MCP isError flag obrazac za saopštavanje grešaka alata nazad agentu

knowledge.en: The distinction between transient errors (timeouts, service unavailability), validation errors (invalid input), business errors (policy violations), and permission errors
knowledge.sr: Razlika između tranzijentnih grešaka (timeout, nedostupnost servisa), validacionih grešaka (nevažeći ulaz), poslovnih grešaka (kršenje pravila) i grešaka dozvola

knowledge.en: Why uniform error responses (generic "Operation failed") prevent the agent from making appropriate recovery decisions
knowledge.sr: Zašto uniformne greške (generičko „Operation failed") sprečavaju agenta da donese odgovarajuće odluke o oporavku

knowledge.en: The difference between retryable and non-retryable errors, and how returning structured metadata prevents wasted retry attempts
knowledge.sr: Razlika između grešaka koje se mogu i ne mogu ponoviti, i kako vraćanje strukturisanih metapodataka sprečava uzaludne pokušaje ponavljanja

skills.en: Returning structured error metadata including errorCategory (transient/validation/permission), isRetryable boolean, and human-readable descriptions
skills.sr: Vraćanje strukturisanih metapodataka greške: errorCategory (transient/validation/permission), isRetryable boolean i ljudski-čitljiv opis

skills.en: Including retriable: false flags and customer-friendly explanations for business rule violations so the agent can communicate appropriately
skills.sr: Uključivanje retriable: false flag-ova i korisniku-prijateljskih objašnjenja za kršenja poslovnih pravila da agent može primereno da komunicira

skills.en: Implementing local error recovery within subagents for transient failures, propagating to the coordinator only errors that cannot be resolved locally along with partial results and what was attempted
skills.sr: Implementacija lokalnog oporavka u subagentima za tranzijentne greške, uz prosleđivanje koordinatoru samo grešaka koje se ne mogu rešiti lokalno, zajedno sa parcijalnim rezultatima i onim što je pokušano

skills.en: Distinguishing between access failures (needing retry decisions) and valid empty results (representing successful queries with no matches)
skills.sr: Razlikovanje grešaka pristupa (traže odluku o ponavljanju) i validnih praznih rezultata (uspešni upiti bez pogodaka)

title.en: Distribute tools appropriately across agents and configure tool choice
title.sr: Odgovarajuća raspodela alata po agentima i konfiguracija tool choice-a

knowledge.en: The principle that giving an agent access to too many tools (e.g., 18 instead of 4-5) degrades tool selection reliability by increasing decision complexity
knowledge.sr: Princip da davanje agentu previše alata (npr. 18 umesto 4–5) pogoršava pouzdanost izbora alata povećanjem složenosti odluke

knowledge.en: Why agents with tools outside their specialization tend to misuse them (e.g., a synthesis agent attempting web searches)
knowledge.sr: Zašto agenti sa alatima van svoje specijalizacije teže da ih zloupotrebe (npr. agent za sintezu pokušava web pretragu)

knowledge.en: Scoped tool access: giving agents only the tools needed for their role, with limited cross-role tools for specific high-frequency needs
knowledge.sr: Ograničen pristup alatima: davati agentima samo alate potrebne za njihovu ulogu, uz ograničene unakrsne alate za specifične česte potrebe

knowledge.en: tool_choice configuration options: "auto", "any", and forced tool selection ({"type": "tool", "name": "..."})
knowledge.sr: Opcije tool_choice konfiguracije: "auto", "any" i prinudni izbor alata ({"type": "tool", "name": "..."})

skills.en: Restricting each subagent's tool set to those relevant to its role, preventing cross-specialization misuse
skills.sr: Ograničavanje skupa alata svakog subagenta na one relevantne za njegovu ulogu, čime se sprečava zloupotreba van specijalizacije

skills.en: Replacing generic tools with constrained alternatives (e.g., replacing fetch_url with load_document that validates document URLs)
skills.sr: Zamena generičkih alata ograničenim alternativama (npr. fetch_url sa load_document koji validira URL-ove dokumenata)

skills.en: Providing scoped cross-role tools for high-frequency needs (e.g., a verify_fact tool for the synthesis agent) while routing complex cases through the coordinator
skills.sr: Davanje ograničenih unakrsnih alata za česte potrebe (npr. verify_fact za agenta za sintezu) uz rutiranje složenih slučajeva kroz koordinatora

skills.en: Using tool_choice forced selection to ensure a specific tool is called first (e.g., forcing extract_metadata before enrichment tools), then processing subsequent steps in follow-up turns
skills.sr: Korišćenje prinudnog tool_choice da se određeni alat pozove prvi (npr. extract_metadata pre alata za obogaćivanje), pa obrada narednih koraka u sledećim potezima

skills.en: Setting tool_choice: "any" to guarantee the model calls a tool rather than returning conversational text
skills.sr: Postavljanje tool_choice: "any" da se garantuje da model poziva alat umesto da vraća konverzacioni tekst

title.en: Integrate MCP servers into Claude Code and agent workflows
title.sr: Integracija MCP servera u Claude Code i agentske tokove

knowledge.en: MCP server scoping: project-level (.mcp.json) for shared team tooling vs user-level (~/.claude.json) for personal/experimental servers
knowledge.sr: Opseg MCP servera: nivo projekta (.mcp.json) za deljene timske alate vs nivo korisnika (~/.claude.json) za lične/eksperimentalne servere

knowledge.en: Environment variable expansion in .mcp.json (e.g., ${GITHUB_TOKEN}) for credential management without committing secrets
knowledge.sr: Ekspanzija environment varijabli u .mcp.json (npr. ${GITHUB_TOKEN}) za upravljanje kredencijalima bez commit-ovanja tajni

knowledge.en: That tools from all configured MCP servers are discovered at connection time and available simultaneously to the agent
knowledge.sr: Da se alati svih konfigurisanih MCP servera otkrivaju pri povezivanju i istovremeno su dostupni agentu

knowledge.en: MCP resources as a mechanism for exposing content catalogs (e.g., issue summaries, documentation hierarchies, database schemas) to reduce exploratory tool calls
knowledge.sr: MCP resursi kao mehanizam za izlaganje kataloga sadržaja (npr. sažeci tiketa, hijerarhije dokumentacije, šeme baza) radi smanjenja istražnih poziva alata

skills.en: Configuring shared MCP servers in project-scoped .mcp.json with environment variable expansion for authentication tokens
skills.sr: Konfigurisanje deljenih MCP servera u .mcp.json na nivou projekta uz ekspanziju environment varijabli za autentifikacione tokene

skills.en: Configuring personal/experimental MCP servers in user-scoped ~/.claude.json
skills.sr: Konfigurisanje ličnih/eksperimentalnih MCP servera u ~/.claude.json na nivou korisnika

skills.en: Enhancing MCP tool descriptions to explain capabilities and outputs in detail, preventing the agent from preferring built-in tools (like Grep) over more capable MCP tools
skills.sr: Poboljšavanje opisa MCP alata da detaljno objasne mogućnosti i izlaze, čime se sprečava da agent bira ugrađene alate (poput Grep-a) umesto sposobnijih MCP alata

skills.en: Choosing existing community MCP servers over custom implementations for standard integrations (e.g., Jira), reserving custom servers for team-specific workflows
skills.sr: Biranje postojećih community MCP servera umesto custom implementacija za standardne integracije (npr. Jira), uz čuvanje custom servera za timski-specifične tokove

skills.en: Exposing content catalogs as MCP resources to give agents visibility into available data without requiring exploratory tool calls
skills.sr: Izlaganje kataloga sadržaja kao MCP resursa da agenti vide dostupne podatke bez istražnih poziva alata

title.en: Select and apply built-in tools (Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Grep, Glob) effectively
title.sr: Efikasan izbor i primena ugrađenih alata (Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Grep, Glob)

knowledge.en: Grep for content search (searching file contents for patterns like function names, error messages, or import statements)
knowledge.sr: Grep za pretragu sadržaja (pretraga sadržaja fajlova za obrasce poput imena funkcija, poruka grešaka ili import naredbi)

knowledge.en: Glob for file path pattern matching (finding files by name or extension patterns)
knowledge.sr: Glob za poklapanje obrazaca putanja (pronalaženje fajlova po imenu ili ekstenziji)

knowledge.en: Read/Write for full file operations; Edit for targeted modifications using unique text matching
knowledge.sr: Read/Write za rad sa celim fajlovima; Edit za ciljane izmene preko jedinstvenog poklapanja teksta

knowledge.en: When Edit fails due to non-unique text matches, using Read + Write as a fallback for reliable file modifications
knowledge.sr: Kad Edit padne zbog ne-jedinstvenog poklapanja, korišćenje Read + Write kao fallback za pouzdane izmene

skills.en: Selecting Grep for searching code content across a codebase (e.g., finding all callers of a function, locating error messages)
skills.sr: Izbor Grep-a za pretragu koda kroz bazu (npr. svi pozivaoci funkcije, lociranje poruka grešaka)

skills.en: Selecting Glob for finding files matching naming patterns (e.g., **/*.test.tsx)
skills.sr: Izbor Glob-a za pronalaženje fajlova po obrascu imena (npr. **/*.test.tsx)

skills.en: Using Read to load full file contents followed by Write when Edit cannot find unique anchor text
skills.sr: Korišćenje Read za učitavanje celog fajla pa Write kada Edit ne nađe jedinstven sidreni tekst

skills.en: Building codebase understanding incrementally: starting with Grep to find entry points, then using Read to follow imports and trace flows, rather than reading all files upfront
skills.sr: Inkrementalno razumevanje baze: prvo Grep za ulazne tačke, pa Read za praćenje import-a i tokova, umesto čitanja svih fajlova odjednom

skills.en: Tracing function usage across wrapper modules by first identifying all exported names, then searching for each name across the codebase
skills.sr: Praćenje upotrebe funkcije kroz wrapper module: prvo identifikovati sva eksportovana imena, pa pretražiti svako ime kroz bazu

title.en: Domain 3: Claude Code Configuration & Workflows
title.sr: Domen 3: Konfiguracija i tokovi rada Claude Code-a

title.en: Configure CLAUDE.md files with appropriate hierarchy, scoping, and modular organization
title.sr: Konfiguracija CLAUDE.md fajlova sa odgovarajućom hijerarhijom, opsegom i modularnom organizacijom

knowledge.en: The CLAUDE.md configuration hierarchy: user-level (~/.claude/CLAUDE.md), project-level (.claude/CLAUDE.md or root CLAUDE.md), and directory-level (subdirectory CLAUDE.md files)
knowledge.sr: Hijerarhija CLAUDE.md konfiguracije: nivo korisnika (~/.claude/CLAUDE.md), nivo projekta (.claude/CLAUDE.md ili root CLAUDE.md) i nivo direktorijuma (CLAUDE.md u poddirektorijumima)

knowledge.en: That user-level settings apply only to that user—instructions in ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md are not shared with teammates via version control
knowledge.sr: Da podešavanja na nivou korisnika važe samo za tog korisnika — instrukcije u ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md se ne dele sa timom kroz version control

knowledge.en: The @import syntax for referencing external files to keep CLAUDE.md modular (e.g., importing specific standards files relevant to each package)
knowledge.sr: @import sintaksa za referenciranje spoljnih fajlova radi modularnosti CLAUDE.md (npr. import specifičnih standarda relevantnih za svaki paket)

knowledge.en: .claude/rules/ directory for organizing topic-specific rule files as an alternative to a monolithic CLAUDE.md
knowledge.sr: .claude/rules/ direktorijum za organizovanje fajlova pravila po temi kao alternativa monolitnom CLAUDE.md

skills.en: Diagnosing configuration hierarchy issues (e.g., a new team member not receiving instructions because they're in user-level rather than project-level configuration)
skills.sr: Dijagnostika problema hijerarhije (npr. novi član tima ne dobija instrukcije jer su one u konfiguraciji na nivou korisnika a ne projekta)

skills.en: Using @import to selectively include relevant standards files in each package's CLAUDE.md based on maintainer domain knowledge
skills.sr: Korišćenje @import-a za selektivno uključivanje relevantnih standarda u CLAUDE.md svakog paketa na osnovu znanja maintainer-a

skills.en: Splitting large CLAUDE.md files into focused topic-specific files in .claude/rules/ (e.g., testing.md, api-conventions.md, deployment.md)
skills.sr: Deljenje velikih CLAUDE.md fajlova na fokusirane fajlove po temi u .claude/rules/ (npr. testing.md, api-conventions.md, deployment.md)

skills.en: Using the /memory command to verify which memory files are loaded and diagnose inconsistent behavior across sessions
skills.sr: Korišćenje /memory komande za proveru koji su memory fajlovi učitani i dijagnostiku nedoslednog ponašanja kroz sesije

title.en: Create and configure custom slash commands and skills
title.sr: Kreiranje i konfiguracija custom slash komandi i skills-a

knowledge.en: Project-scoped commands in .claude/commands/ (shared via version control) vs user-scoped commands in ~/.claude/commands/ (personal)
knowledge.sr: Komande na nivou projekta u .claude/commands/ (deljene kroz version control) vs komande na nivou korisnika u ~/.claude/commands/ (lične)

knowledge.en: Skills in .claude/skills/ with SKILL.md files that support frontmatter configuration including context: fork, allowed-tools, and argument-hint
knowledge.sr: Skills u .claude/skills/ sa SKILL.md fajlovima koji podržavaju frontmatter konfiguraciju: context: fork, allowed-tools i argument-hint

knowledge.en: The context: fork frontmatter option for running skills in an isolated sub-agent context, preventing skill outputs from polluting the main conversation
knowledge.sr: Opcija context: fork u frontmatter-u za pokretanje skill-a u izolovanom sub-agent kontekstu, čime se sprečava da izlazi skill-a zagade glavni razgovor

knowledge.en: Personal skill customization: creating personal variants in ~/.claude/skills/ with different names to avoid affecting teammates
knowledge.sr: Lično prilagođavanje skill-a: pravljenje ličnih varijanti u ~/.claude/skills/ sa drugačijim imenima da se ne utiče na tim

skills.en: Creating project-scoped slash commands in .claude/commands/ for team-wide availability via version control
skills.sr: Kreiranje slash komandi na nivou projekta u .claude/commands/ za dostupnost celom timu kroz version control

skills.en: Using context: fork to isolate skills that produce verbose output (e.g., codebase analysis) or exploratory context (e.g., brainstorming alternatives) from the main session
skills.sr: Korišćenje context: fork za izolaciju skill-a koji prave opširan izlaz (npr. analiza baze) ili istražni kontekst (npr. brainstorming alternativa) od glavne sesije

skills.en: Configuring allowed-tools in skill frontmatter to restrict tool access during skill execution (e.g., limiting to file write operations to prevent destructive actions)
skills.sr: Konfigurisanje allowed-tools u frontmatter-u skill-a radi ograničavanja pristupa alatima tokom izvršavanja (npr. ograničenje na upis u fajl radi sprečavanja destruktivnih akcija)

skills.en: Using argument-hint frontmatter to prompt developers for required parameters when they invoke the skill without arguments
skills.sr: Korišćenje argument-hint frontmatter-a da se developer podstakne na obavezne parametre kad pozove skill bez argumenata

skills.en: Choosing between skills (on-demand invocation for task-specific workflows) and CLAUDE.md (always-loaded universal standards)
skills.sr: Biranje između skills-a (poziv na zahtev za task-specifične tokove) i CLAUDE.md (uvek učitani univerzalni standardi)

title.en: Apply path-specific rules for conditional convention loading
title.sr: Primena pravila po putanji za uslovno učitavanje konvencija

knowledge.en: .claude/rules/ files with YAML frontmatter paths fields containing glob patterns for conditional rule activation
knowledge.sr: .claude/rules/ fajlovi sa YAML frontmatter paths poljima koja sadrže glob obrasce za uslovno aktiviranje pravila

knowledge.en: How path-scoped rules load only when editing matching files, reducing irrelevant context and token usage
knowledge.sr: Kako se pravila vezana za putanju učitavaju samo pri izmeni odgovarajućih fajlova, smanjujući irelevantan kontekst i potrošnju tokena

knowledge.en: The advantage of glob-pattern rules over directory-level CLAUDE.md files for conventions that span multiple directories (e.g., test files spread throughout a codebase)
knowledge.sr: Prednost pravila sa glob obrascima nad CLAUDE.md na nivou direktorijuma za konvencije koje se protežu kroz više direktorijuma (npr. test fajlovi razbacani po bazi)

skills.en: Creating .claude/rules/ files with YAML frontmatter path scoping (e.g., paths: ["terraform/**/*"]) so rules load only when editing matching files
skills.sr: Kreiranje .claude/rules/ fajlova sa YAML frontmatter opsegom po putanji (npr. paths: ["terraform/**/*"]) da se pravila učitavaju samo pri izmeni odgovarajućih fajlova

skills.en: Using glob patterns in path-specific rules to apply conventions to files by type regardless of directory location (e.g., **/*.test.tsx for all test files)
skills.sr: Korišćenje glob obrazaca u pravilima po putanji da se konvencije primene na fajlove po tipu bez obzira na lokaciju (npr. **/*.test.tsx za sve test fajlove)

skills.en: Choosing path-specific rules over subdirectory CLAUDE.md files when conventions must apply to files spread across the codebase
skills.sr: Biranje pravila po putanji umesto CLAUDE.md u poddirektorijumu kada konvencije moraju važiti za fajlove razbacane po bazi

title.en: Determine when to use plan mode vs direct execution
title.sr: Procena kada koristiti plan mod a kada direktno izvršavanje

knowledge.en: Plan mode is designed for complex tasks involving large-scale changes, multiple valid approaches, architectural decisions, and multi-file modifications
knowledge.sr: Plan mod je za složene zadatke sa velikim izmenama, više validnih pristupa, arhitektonske odluke i izmene više fajlova

knowledge.en: Direct execution is appropriate for simple, well-scoped changes (e.g., adding a single validation check to one function)
knowledge.sr: Direktno izvršavanje je primereno za jednostavne, jasno omeđene izmene (npr. dodavanje jedne validacione provere u jednu funkciju)

knowledge.en: Plan mode enables safe codebase exploration and design before committing to changes, preventing costly rework
knowledge.sr: Plan mod omogućava bezbedno istraživanje baze i dizajn pre nego što se uđe u izmene, sprečavajući skupu doradu

knowledge.en: The Explore subagent for isolating verbose discovery output and returning summaries to preserve main conversation context
knowledge.sr: Explore subagent za izolaciju opširnog izlaza istraživanja i vraćanje sažetaka radi očuvanja konteksta glavnog razgovora

skills.en: Selecting plan mode for tasks with architectural implications (e.g., microservice restructuring, library migrations affecting 45+ files, choosing between integration approaches with different infrastructure requirements)
skills.sr: Izbor plan moda za zadatke sa arhitektonskim implikacijama (npr. restrukturiranje u mikroservise, migracije biblioteka koje pogađaju 45+ fajlova, izbor između integracionih pristupa sa različitim infrastrukturnim zahtevima)

skills.en: Selecting direct execution for well-understood changes with clear scope (e.g., a single-file bug fix with a clear stack trace, adding a date validation conditional)
skills.sr: Izbor direktnog izvršavanja za dobro shvaćene izmene jasnog opsega (npr. bug fix u jednom fajlu sa jasnim stack trace-om, dodavanje uslovne validacije datuma)

skills.en: Using the Explore subagent for verbose discovery phases to prevent context window exhaustion during multi-phase tasks
skills.sr: Korišćenje Explore subagenta za opširne faze istraživanja radi sprečavanja iscrpljivanja context window-a u višefaznim zadacima

skills.en: Combining plan mode for investigation with direct execution for implementation (e.g., planning a library migration, then executing the planned approach)
skills.sr: Kombinovanje plan moda za istraživanje sa direktnim izvršavanjem za implementaciju (npr. planiranje migracije biblioteke, pa izvršavanje isplaniranog pristupa)

title.en: Apply iterative refinement techniques for progressive improvement
title.sr: Primena tehnika iterativne dorade za postepeno poboljšanje

knowledge.en: Concrete input/output examples as the most effective way to communicate expected transformations when prose descriptions are interpreted inconsistently
knowledge.sr: Konkretni ulaz/izlaz primeri kao najefikasniji način da se saopšti očekivana transformacija kada se prozni opisi tumače nedosledno

knowledge.en: Test-driven iteration: writing test suites first, then iterating by sharing test failures to guide progressive improvement
knowledge.sr: Iteracija vođena testovima: prvo pisanje testova, pa iteracija deljenjem neuspeha testova radi postepenog poboljšanja

knowledge.en: The interview pattern: having Claude ask questions to surface considerations the developer may not have anticipated before implementing
knowledge.sr: Interview obrazac: Claude postavlja pitanja da iznese razmatranja koja developer možda nije predvideo pre implementacije

knowledge.en: When to provide all issues in a single message (interacting problems) versus fixing them sequentially (independent problems)
knowledge.sr: Kada dati sve probleme u jednoj poruci (problemi koji se prepliću) a kada ih rešavati redom (nezavisni problemi)

skills.en: Providing 2-3 concrete input/output examples to clarify transformation requirements when natural language descriptions produce inconsistent results
skills.sr: Davanje 2–3 konkretna ulaz/izlaz primera radi pojašnjenja zahteva transformacije kada opisi na prirodnom jeziku daju nedosledne rezultate

skills.en: Writing test suites covering expected behavior, edge cases, and performance requirements before implementation, then iterating by sharing test failures
skills.sr: Pisanje testova koji pokrivaju očekivano ponašanje, edge case-ove i performansne zahteve pre implementacije, pa iteracija deljenjem neuspeha

skills.en: Using the interview pattern to surface design considerations (e.g., cache invalidation strategies, failure modes) before implementing solutions in unfamiliar domains
skills.sr: Korišćenje interview obrasca da se iznesu dizajn razmatranja (npr. strategije invalidacije keša, režimi otkaza) pre implementacije u nepoznatim domenima

skills.en: Providing specific test cases with example input and expected output to fix edge case handling (e.g., null values in migration scripts)
skills.sr: Davanje konkretnih test slučajeva sa primerom ulaza i očekivanim izlazom radi ispravke edge case-ova (npr. null vrednosti u migracionim skriptama)

skills.en: Addressing multiple interacting issues in a single detailed message when fixes interact, versus sequential iteration for independent issues
skills.sr: Rešavanje više isprepletanih problema u jednoj detaljnoj poruci kad se ispravke prepliću, naspram sekvencijalne iteracije za nezavisne probleme

title.en: Integrate Claude Code into CI/CD pipelines
title.sr: Integracija Claude Code-a u CI/CD pipeline-e

knowledge.en: The -p (or --print) flag for running Claude Code in non-interactive mode in automated pipelines
knowledge.sr: Flag -p (ili --print) za pokretanje Claude Code-a u neinteraktivnom režimu u automatizovanim pipeline-ima

knowledge.en: --output-format json and --json-schema CLI flags for enforcing structured output in CI contexts
knowledge.sr: CLI flag-ovi --output-format json i --json-schema za sprovođenje strukturisanog izlaza u CI kontekstu

knowledge.en: CLAUDE.md as the mechanism for providing project context (testing standards, fixture conventions, review criteria) to CI-invoked Claude Code
knowledge.sr: CLAUDE.md kao mehanizam za davanje projektnog konteksta (test standardi, konvencije fixture-a, kriterijumi review-a) Claude Code-u pozvanom iz CI-ja

knowledge.en: Session context isolation: why the same Claude session that generated code is less effective at reviewing its own changes compared to an independent review instance
knowledge.sr: Izolacija konteksta sesije: zašto je ista Claude sesija koja je generisala kod manje efikasna u review-u sopstvenih izmena u poređenju sa nezavisnom review instancom

skills.en: Running Claude Code in CI with the -p flag to prevent interactive input hangs
skills.sr: Pokretanje Claude Code-a u CI-ju sa -p flag-om da se spreči zaglavljivanje na interaktivni unos

skills.en: Using --output-format json with --json-schema to produce machine-parseable structured findings for automated posting as inline PR comments
skills.sr: Korišćenje --output-format json sa --json-schema za mašinski-čitljive strukturisane nalaze radi automatskog postavljanja kao inline PR komentari

skills.en: Including prior review findings in context when re-running reviews after new commits, instructing Claude to report only new or still-unaddressed issues to avoid duplicate comments
skills.sr: Uključivanje ranijih nalaza u kontekst pri ponovnom review-u posle novih commit-a, uz uputstvo Claude-u da prijavi samo nove ili još nerešene probleme radi izbegavanja dupliranih komentara

skills.en: Providing existing test files in context so test generation avoids suggesting duplicate scenarios already covered by the test suite
skills.sr: Davanje postojećih test fajlova u kontekst da generisanje testova ne predlaže scenarije već pokrivene test setom

skills.en: Documenting testing standards, valuable test criteria, and available fixtures in CLAUDE.md to improve test generation quality and reduce low-value test output
skills.sr: Dokumentovanje test standarda, vrednih kriterijuma testa i dostupnih fixture-a u CLAUDE.md radi boljeg kvaliteta generisanih testova i smanjenja bezvrednih testova

title.en: Domain 4: Prompt Engineering & Structured Output
title.sr: Domen 4: Prompt engineering i strukturisan izlaz

title.en: Design prompts with explicit criteria to improve precision and reduce false positives
title.sr: Dizajn promptova sa eksplicitnim kriterijumima radi bolje preciznosti i manje false positive-a

knowledge.en: The importance of explicit criteria over vague instructions (e.g., "flag comments only when claimed behavior contradicts actual code behavior" vs "check that comments are accurate")
knowledge.sr: Važnost eksplicitnih kriterijuma nad maglovitim instrukcijama (npr. „označi komentare samo kad tvrđeno ponašanje protivreči stvarnom ponašanju koda" vs „proveri da su komentari tačni")

knowledge.en: How general instructions like "be conservative" or "only report high-confidence findings" fail to improve precision compared to specific categorical criteria
knowledge.sr: Kako opšte instrukcije poput „budi konzervativan" ili „prijavi samo nalaze visoke pouzdanosti" ne poboljšavaju preciznost u poređenju sa konkretnim kategorijskim kriterijumima

knowledge.en: The impact of false positive rates on developer trust: high false positive categories undermine confidence in accurate categories
knowledge.sr: Uticaj stope false positive-a na poverenje developera: kategorije sa mnogo lažnih uzbuna podrivaju poverenje i u tačne kategorije

skills.en: Writing specific review criteria that define which issues to report (bugs, security) versus skip (minor style, local patterns) rather than relying on confidence-based filtering
skills.sr: Pisanje konkretnih kriterijuma review-a koji definišu koje probleme prijaviti (bagovi, bezbednost) a koje preskočiti (sitan stil, lokalni obrasci) umesto oslanjanja na filtriranje po pouzdanosti

skills.en: Temporarily disabling high false-positive categories to restore developer trust while improving prompts for those categories
skills.sr: Privremeno isključivanje kategorija sa visokim false positive-om radi vraćanja poverenja, uz poboljšavanje promptova za te kategorije

skills.en: Defining explicit severity criteria with concrete code examples for each severity level to achieve consistent classification
skills.sr: Definisanje eksplicitnih kriterijuma ozbiljnosti sa konkretnim primerima koda za svaki nivo radi dosledne klasifikacije

title.en: Apply few-shot prompting to improve output consistency and quality
title.sr: Primena few-shot prompting-a radi bolje doslednosti i kvaliteta izlaza

knowledge.en: Few-shot examples as the most effective technique for achieving consistently formatted, actionable output when detailed instructions alone produce inconsistent results
knowledge.sr: Few-shot primeri kao najefikasnija tehnika za dosledno formatiran, upotrebljiv izlaz kada same detaljne instrukcije daju nedosledne rezultate

knowledge.en: The role of few-shot examples in demonstrating ambiguous-case handling (e.g., tool selection for ambiguous requests, branch-level test coverage gaps)
knowledge.sr: Uloga few-shot primera u demonstriranju obrade dvosmislenih slučajeva (npr. izbor alata za dvosmislene zahteve, rupe u pokrivenosti testova po granama)

knowledge.en: How few-shot examples enable the model to generalize judgment to novel patterns rather than matching only pre-specified cases
knowledge.sr: Kako few-shot primeri omogućavaju modelu da generalizuje procenu na nove obrasce umesto da poklapa samo unapred zadate slučajeve

knowledge.en: The effectiveness of few-shot examples for reducing hallucination in extraction tasks (e.g., handling informal measurements, varied document structures)
knowledge.sr: Efikasnost few-shot primera u smanjenju halucinacija u zadacima ekstrakcije (npr. neformalne mere, raznolike strukture dokumenata)

skills.en: Creating 2-4 targeted few-shot examples for ambiguous scenarios that show reasoning for why one action was chosen over plausible alternatives
skills.sr: Pravljenje 2–4 ciljana few-shot primera za dvosmislene scenarije koji pokazuju rezonovanje zašto je jedna akcija izabrana nad uverljivim alternativama

skills.en: Including few-shot examples that demonstrate specific desired output format (location, issue, severity, suggested fix) to achieve consistency
skills.sr: Uključivanje few-shot primera koji demonstriraju konkretan željeni format izlaza (lokacija, problem, ozbiljnost, predložena ispravka) radi doslednosti

skills.en: Providing few-shot examples distinguishing acceptable code patterns from genuine issues to reduce false positives while enabling generalization
skills.sr: Davanje few-shot primera koji razlikuju prihvatljive obrasce koda od stvarnih problema radi smanjenja false positive-a uz mogućnost generalizacije

skills.en: Using few-shot examples to demonstrate correct handling of varied document structures (inline citations vs bibliographies, methodology sections vs embedded details)
skills.sr: Korišćenje few-shot primera za demonstraciju pravilne obrade raznolikih struktura dokumenata (inline čitati vs bibliografije, sekcije metodologije vs ugrađeni detalji)

skills.en: Adding few-shot examples showing correct extraction from documents with varied formats to address empty/null extraction of required fields
skills.sr: Dodavanje few-shot primera koji pokazuju pravilnu ekstrakciju iz dokumenata raznolikih formata radi rešavanja prazne/null ekstrakcije obaveznih polja

title.en: Enforce structured output using tool use and JSON schemas
title.sr: Sprovođenje strukturisanog izlaza pomoću tool use-a i JSON šema

knowledge.en: Tool use (tool_use) with JSON schemas as the most reliable approach for guaranteed schema-compliant structured output, eliminating JSON syntax errors
knowledge.sr: Tool use (tool_use) sa JSON šemama kao najpouzdaniji pristup za garantovano šemi-usklađen strukturisan izlaz, koji eliminiše JSON sintaksne greške

knowledge.en: The distinction between tool_choice: "auto" (model may return text instead of calling a tool), "any" (model must call a tool but can choose which), and forced tool selection (model must call a specific named tool)
knowledge.sr: Razlika između tool_choice: "auto" (model sme da vrati tekst umesto poziva alata), "any" (model mora pozvati neki alat ali bira koji) i prinudnog izbora (model mora pozvati tačno imenovan alat)

knowledge.en: That strict JSON schemas via tool use eliminate syntax errors but do not prevent semantic errors (e.g., line items that don't sum to total, values in wrong fields)
knowledge.sr: Da stroge JSON šeme preko tool use-a eliminišu sintaksne greške ali ne sprečavaju semantičke (npr. stavke koje se ne sabiraju u total, vrednosti u pogrešnim poljima)

knowledge.en: Schema design considerations: required vs optional fields, enum fields with "other" + detail string patterns for extensible categories
knowledge.sr: Razmatranja dizajna šeme: obavezna vs opciona polja, enum polja sa „other" + detail string obrascem za proširive kategorije

skills.en: Defining extraction tools with JSON schemas as input parameters and extracting structured data from the tool_use response
skills.sr: Definisanje alata za ekstrakciju sa JSON šemama kao ulaznim parametrima i vađenje strukturisanih podataka iz tool_use odgovora

skills.en: Setting tool_choice: "any" to guarantee structured output when multiple extraction schemas exist and the document type is unknown
skills.sr: Postavljanje tool_choice: "any" da se garantuje strukturisan izlaz kada postoji više šema ekstrakcije a tip dokumenta je nepoznat

skills.en: Forcing a specific tool with tool_choice: {"type": "tool", "name": "extract_metadata"} to ensure a particular extraction runs before enrichment steps
skills.sr: Prinuda određenog alata sa tool_choice: {"type": "tool", "name": "extract_metadata"} da se određena ekstrakcija izvrši pre koraka obogaćivanja

skills.en: Designing schema fields as optional (nullable) when source documents may not contain the information, preventing the model from fabricating values to satisfy required fields
skills.sr: Dizajn polja šeme kao opcionih (nullable) kada izvorni dokumenti možda nemaju informaciju, čime se sprečava da model izmišlja vrednosti da zadovolji obavezna polja

skills.en: Adding enum values like "unclear" for ambiguous cases and "other" + detail fields for extensible categorization
skills.sr: Dodavanje enum vrednosti poput „unclear" za dvosmislene slučajeve i „other" + detail polja za proširivu kategorizaciju

skills.en: Including format normalization rules in prompts alongside strict output schemas to handle inconsistent source formatting
skills.sr: Uključivanje pravila normalizacije formata u promptove uz stroge izlazne šeme radi obrade nedoslednog formatiranja izvora

title.en: Implement validation, retry, and feedback loops for extraction quality
title.sr: Implementacija validacije, ponavljanja i feedback petlji za kvalitet ekstrakcije

knowledge.en: Retry-with-error-feedback: appending specific validation errors to the prompt on retry to guide the model toward correction
knowledge.sr: Retry-with-error-feedback: dodavanje konkretnih validacionih grešaka u prompt pri ponavljanju da se model navede ka ispravci

knowledge.en: The limits of retry: retries are ineffective when the required information is simply absent from the source document (vs format or structural errors)
knowledge.sr: Granice ponavljanja: ponavljanje je neefikasno kada tražena informacija prosto ne postoji u izvornom dokumentu (za razliku od grešaka formata ili strukture)

knowledge.en: Feedback loop design: tracking which code constructs trigger findings (detected_pattern field) to enable systematic analysis of dismissal patterns
knowledge.sr: Dizajn feedback petlje: praćenje koje konstrukcije koda izazivaju nalaze (polje detected_pattern) radi sistematske analize obrazaca odbacivanja

knowledge.en: The difference between semantic validation errors (values don't sum, wrong field placement) and schema syntax errors (eliminated by tool use)
knowledge.sr: Razlika između semantičkih validacionih grešaka (vrednosti se ne sabiraju, pogrešan smeštaj polja) i sintaksnih grešaka šeme (eliminisanih tool use-om)

skills.en: Implementing follow-up requests that include the original document, the failed extraction, and specific validation errors for model self-correction
skills.sr: Implementacija narednih zahteva koji uključuju originalni dokument, neuspelu ekstrakciju i konkretne validacione greške radi samoispravke modela

skills.en: Identifying when retries will be ineffective (e.g., information exists only in an external document not provided) versus when they will succeed (format mismatches, structural output errors)
skills.sr: Prepoznavanje kada će ponavljanje biti neefikasno (npr. informacija postoji samo u eksternom dokumentu koji nije dat) a kada će uspeti (neslaganje formata, strukturne greške izlaza)

skills.en: Adding detected_pattern fields to structured findings to enable analysis of false positive patterns when developers dismiss findings
skills.sr: Dodavanje detected_pattern polja u strukturisane nalaze radi analize obrazaca false positive-a kada developeri odbacuju nalaze

skills.en: Designing self-correction validation flows: extracting "calculated_total" alongside "stated_total" to flag discrepancies, adding "conflict_detected" booleans for inconsistent source data
skills.sr: Dizajn samoispravljajućih validacionih tokova: vađenje „calculated_total" pored „stated_total" radi označavanja neslaganja, dodavanje „conflict_detected" boolean-a za nedosledne izvorne podatke

title.en: Design efficient batch processing strategies
title.sr: Dizajn efikasnih strategija batch obrade

knowledge.en: The Message Batches API: 50% cost savings, up to 24-hour processing window, no guaranteed latency SLA
knowledge.sr: Message Batches API: 50% uštede troškova, prozor obrade do 24h, bez garantovanog SLA za latenciju

knowledge.en: Batch processing is appropriate for non-blocking, latency-tolerant workloads (overnight reports, weekly audits, nightly test generation) and inappropriate for blocking workflows (pre-merge checks)
knowledge.sr: Batch obrada je primerena za neblokirajuće, latencijski-tolerantne poslove (noćni izveštaji, nedeljni auditi, noćno generisanje testova) a neprimerena za blokirajuće tokove (pre-merge provere)

knowledge.en: The batch API does not support multi-turn tool calling within a single request (cannot execute tools mid-request and return results)
knowledge.sr: Batch API ne podržava višekružne pozive alata unutar jednog zahteva (ne može izvršiti alate usred zahteva i vratiti rezultate)

knowledge.en: custom_id fields for correlating batch request/response pairs
knowledge.sr: custom_id polja za uparivanje batch zahteva i odgovora

skills.en: Matching API approach to workflow latency requirements: synchronous API for blocking pre-merge checks, batch API for overnight/weekly analysis
skills.sr: Usklađivanje pristupa API-ju sa latencijskim zahtevima toka: sinhroni API za blokirajuće pre-merge provere, batch API za noćnu/nedeljnu analizu

skills.en: Calculating batch submission frequency based on SLA constraints (e.g., 4-hour windows to guarantee 30-hour SLA with 24-hour batch processing)
skills.sr: Računanje učestalosti slanja batch-eva prema SLA ograničenjima (npr. prozori od 4h da se garantuje SLA od 30h uz 24h batch obrade)

skills.en: Handling batch failures: resubmitting only failed documents (identified by custom_id) with appropriate modifications (e.g., chunking documents that exceeded context limits)
skills.sr: Obrada neuspelih batch-eva: ponovno slanje samo neuspelih dokumenata (identifikovanih custom_id-jem) uz primerene izmene (npr. seckanje dokumenata koji su prešli kontekst limit)

skills.en: Using prompt refinement on a sample set before batch-processing large volumes to maximize first-pass success rates and reduce iterative resubmission costs
skills.sr: Dorada prompta na uzorku pre batch obrade velikih količina radi maksimizacije uspeha u prvom prolazu i smanjenja troškova ponovnog slanja

title.en: Design multi-instance and multi-pass review architectures
title.sr: Dizajn arhitektura review-a sa više instanci i više prolaza

knowledge.en: Self-review limitations: a model retains reasoning context from generation, making it less likely to question its own decisions in the same session
knowledge.sr: Ograničenja samo-review-a: model zadržava kontekst rezonovanja iz generisanja, pa je manje sklon da preispita sopstvene odluke u istoj sesiji

knowledge.en: Independent review instances (without prior reasoning context) are more effective at catching subtle issues than self-review instructions or extended thinking
knowledge.sr: Nezavisne review instance (bez prethodnog konteksta rezonovanja) bolje hvataju suptilne probleme nego instrukcije za samo-review ili extended thinking

knowledge.en: Multi-pass review: splitting large reviews into per-file local analysis passes plus cross-file integration passes to avoid attention dilution and contradictory findings
knowledge.sr: Review u više prolaza: deljenje velikih review-a na lokalne prolaze po fajlu plus cross-file integracione prolaze radi izbegavanja attention dilution-a i protivrečnih nalaza

skills.en: Using a second independent Claude instance to review generated code without the generator's reasoning context
skills.sr: Korišćenje druge nezavisne Claude instance za review generisanog koda bez konteksta rezonovanja generatora

skills.en: Splitting large multi-file reviews into focused per-file passes for local issues plus separate integration passes for cross-file data flow analysis
skills.sr: Deljenje velikih višefajl review-a na fokusirane prolaze po fajlu za lokalne probleme plus zasebne integracione prolaze za analizu protoka podataka između fajlova

skills.en: Running verification passes where the model self-reports confidence alongside each finding to enable calibrated review routing
skills.sr: Pokretanje verifikacionih prolaza gde model uz svaki nalaz sam prijavljuje pouzdanost radi kalibrisanog rutiranja review-a

title.en: Domain 5: Context Management & Reliability
title.sr: Domen 5: Upravljanje kontekstom i pouzdanost

title.en: Manage conversation context to preserve critical information across long interactions
title.sr: Upravljanje kontekstom razgovora radi očuvanja ključnih informacija kroz duge interakcije

knowledge.en: Progressive summarization risks: condensing numerical values, percentages, dates, and customer-stated expectations into vague summaries
knowledge.sr: Rizici progresivnog sažimanja: sažimanje brojeva, procenata, datuma i očekivanja koja je korisnik naveo u maglovite sažetke

knowledge.en: The "lost in the middle" effect: models reliably process information at the beginning and end of long inputs but may omit findings from middle sections
knowledge.sr: Efekat „lost in the middle": modeli pouzdano obrađuju informacije na početku i kraju dugih ulaza ali mogu izostaviti nalaze iz sredine

knowledge.en: How tool results accumulate in context and consume tokens disproportionately to their relevance (e.g., 40+ fields per order lookup when only 5 are relevant)
knowledge.sr: Kako se rezultati alata gomilaju u kontekstu i troše tokene nesrazmerno svojoj relevantnosti (npr. 40+ polja po lookup-u porudžbine kada je samo 5 relevantno)

knowledge.en: The importance of passing complete conversation history in subsequent API requests to maintain conversational coherence
knowledge.sr: Važnost prosleđivanja kompletne istorije razgovora u narednim API zahtevima radi održavanja koherentnosti razgovora

skills.en: Extracting transactional facts (amounts, dates, order numbers, statuses) into a persistent "case facts" block included in each prompt, outside summarized history
skills.sr: Izdvajanje transakcionih činjenica (iznosi, datumi, brojevi porudžbina, statusi) u trajan „case facts" blok koji se uključuje u svaki prompt, van sažete istorije

skills.en: Extracting and persisting structured issue data (order IDs, amounts, statuses) into a separate context layer for multi-issue sessions
skills.sr: Izdvajanje i čuvanje strukturisanih podataka o problemu (ID porudžbina, iznosi, statusi) u zaseban sloj konteksta za sesije sa više problema

skills.en: Trimming verbose tool outputs to only relevant fields before they accumulate in context (e.g., keeping only return-relevant fields from order lookups)
skills.sr: Skraćivanje opširnih izlaza alata na samo relevantna polja pre nego što se nagomilaju u kontekstu (npr. čuvanje samo polja relevantnih za povraćaj iz lookup-a porudžbine)

skills.en: Placing key findings summaries at the beginning of aggregated inputs and organizing detailed results with explicit section headers to mitigate position effects
skills.sr: Postavljanje sažetaka ključnih nalaza na početak agregiranih ulaza i organizovanje detaljnih rezultata sa eksplicitnim naslovima sekcija radi ublažavanja pozicionih efekata

skills.en: Requiring subagents to include metadata (dates, source locations, methodological context) in structured outputs to support accurate downstream synthesis
skills.sr: Zahtevanje da subagenti uključe metapodatke (datumi, lokacije izvora, metodološki kontekst) u strukturisane izlaze radi tačne dalje sinteze

skills.en: Modifying upstream agents to return structured data (key facts, citations, relevance scores) instead of verbose content and reasoning chains when downstream agents have limited context budgets
skills.sr: Izmena upstream agenata da vraćaju strukturisane podatke (ključne činjenice, čitate, ocene relevantnosti) umesto opširnog sadržaja i lanaca rezonovanja kada downstream agenti imaju ograničen budžet konteksta

title.en: Design effective escalation and ambiguity resolution patterns
title.sr: Dizajn efikasnih obrazaca eskalacije i razrešavanja dvosmislenosti

knowledge.en: Appropriate escalation triggers: customer requests for a human, policy exceptions/gaps (not just complex cases), and inability to make meaningful progress
knowledge.sr: Pravi okidači eskalacije: zahtev korisnika za čoveka, izuzeci/rupe u pravilima (ne samo složeni slučajevi) i nemogućnost smislenog napretka

knowledge.en: The distinction between escalating immediately when a customer explicitly demands it versus offering to resolve when the issue is straightforward
knowledge.sr: Razlika između trenutne eskalacije kada korisnik to izričito traži i nuđenja da se reši kada je problem jednostavan

knowledge.en: Why sentiment-based escalation and self-reported confidence scores are unreliable proxies for actual case complexity
knowledge.sr: Zašto su eskalacija po sentimentu i samoprijavljene ocene pouzdanosti nepouzdani pokazatelji stvarne složenosti slučaja

knowledge.en: How multiple customer matches require clarification (requesting additional identifiers) rather than heuristic selection
knowledge.sr: Kako više poklapanja korisnika traži pojašnjenje (traženje dodatnih identifikatora) umesto heurističkog biranja

skills.en: Adding explicit escalation criteria with few-shot examples to the system prompt demonstrating when to escalate versus resolve autonomously
skills.sr: Dodavanje eksplicitnih kriterijuma eskalacije sa few-shot primerima u sistemski prompt koji pokazuju kada eskalirati a kada rešiti samostalno

skills.en: Honoring explicit customer requests for human agents immediately without first attempting investigation
skills.sr: Trenutno poštovanje izričitog zahteva korisnika za čoveka bez prethodnog pokušaja istrage

skills.en: Acknowledging frustration while offering resolution when the issue is within the agent's capability, escalating only if the customer reiterates their preference
skills.sr: Priznavanje frustracije uz nuđenje rešenja kada je problem u domenu agenta, uz eskalaciju samo ako korisnik ponovi svoju želju

skills.en: Escalating when policy is ambiguous or silent on the customer's specific request (e.g., competitor price matching when policy only addresses own-site adjustments)
skills.sr: Eskalacija kada je politika dvosmislena ili ćuti o konkretnom zahtevu (npr. izjednačavanje cene sa konkurencijom kada politika pokriva samo korekcije na sopstvenom sajtu)
